hooks.command: REALM=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"); printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"This is %s, a Bifrost submodule. Norse Architecture settings (the superpowers plugin, permission rules) only apply when Bifrost itself is the session root, since Claude Code never merges a submodule .claude/settings.json into a parent-launched session. Exit, cd to ../Bifrost, and run claude there instead.","systemMessage":"Blocked: launch Claude Code from the Bifrost root, not from inside %s."}' "$REALM" "$REALM"
